CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_outbox (id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), operation_key text NOT NULL, type text NOT NULL, research_id text NOT NULL, escrow_address text, phase text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued', payload_hash text NOT NULL, protected_payload_digest text NOT NULL, protected_payload text, lease_owner text, lease_expires_at timestamptz, fencing_token integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, attempts integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, next_attempt_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), tx_hash text, chain_id integer, block_number text, block_hash text, log_index integer, last_error text, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
ALTER TABLE workflow_outbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS protected_payload text

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research_event (id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), research_id text NOT NULL, cursor integer NOT NULL, type text NOT NULL, payload jsonb NOT NULL, payload_hash text NOT NULL, operation_key text, attempt integer, fencing_token integer, dedupe_key text, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research_checkpoint (id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), research_id text NOT NULL, cursor integer NOT NULL, operation_key text NOT NULL, attempt integer NOT NULL, fencing_token integer NOT NULL, payload_hash text NOT NULL, state jsonb NOT NULL, dedupe_key text, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research_quota_usage (id text PRIMARY KEY, bucket_type text NOT NULL, bucket_key text NOT NULL, day text NOT NULL, consumed integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, reserved integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, used integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, reset_at timestamptz NOT NULL, updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
ALTER TABLE research_quota_usage ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consumed integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE research_quota_usage ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reserved integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
